mapper.select: SELECT id, expense_request_id AS expenseRequestId, eligible_count AS eligibleCount, required_count AS requiredCount, approve_count AS approveCount, reject_count AS rejectCount, status, version, created_at AS createdAt, expires_at AS expiresAt, closed_at AS closedAt FROM woorido.expense_votes WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN choice = 'APPROVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS AGREE, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN choice = 'REJECT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DISAGREE, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL FROM woorido.expense_vote_records WHERE expense_vote_id = #{voteId}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.expense_votes SET status = #{status}, closed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{voteId}
UPDATE woorido.expense_votes SET status = 'EXPIRED', closed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < SYSTIMESTAMP
